basic_details.job_title: IISER Pune Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research (IISER), Pune
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research (IISER), Pune has released the official Teaching Assistant (Part-Time) Notification 2026 on 08 July 2026 at https://www.iiserpune.ac.in/. A total of 05 vacancies have been announced under the IISER Pune Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 45 years with a qualification of MA/M.Phil. in English, English Literature, Comparative Literature, Modern Literature, Linguistics, ELT, TESOL, Society and Culture, Media Studies or Creative Writing with at least 55% marks, or BA in the relevant discipline with 55% marks and te

important_dates.interview_date: To be informed to shortlisted candidates via email

age_limit.age_details: Not more than 45 years (as on last date of application)

qualification.details: Minimum Educational Qualification: | MA / M.Phil. Degree in English / English Literature / Comparative Literature / Modern Literature / Linguistics / ELT / TESOL / Society and Culture / Media Studies / Creative Writing with minimum 55% marks, OR BA in English / English Literature / Comparative Literature / Modern Literature / Linguistics / ELT / TESOL / Society and Culture / Media Studies / Creative Writing with minimum 55% marks + relevant teaching experience, OR CELTA / DELTA / PGCTE / PGDTE Certification. | Preference: Candidates having prior experience in teaching English will be preferred. | Job Requirements: | Involved with the Academic Communication Skills course taught to BS-MS first-year students. Attend classes (2 hours) and teach two tutorial batches (3 hours) per week on campus. Grade assignments on a weekly basis.

how_to_apply: Prepare the application in the prescribed format (available as "Apply Now" in the advertisement).
Convert the application into PDF format.
Send the application via email to [email protected].
Mention in the subject line: “Teaching Assistant (Part-Time) and Advt. No. 50/2026”.
Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email. List will also be uploaded on the IISER Pune website.
important_instructions: The appointment is purely temporary and will terminate automatically without any notice. No claim for regular appointment or absorption in IISER Pune. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Age relaxation may be considered for candidates with higher qualifications/experience. Incomplete applications or those received after the deadline will not be considered. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Teaching Assistant Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Minimum Educational Qualification: MA / M.Phil. Degree in English / English Literature / Comparative Literature / Modern Literature / Linguistics / ELT / TESOL / Society and Culture / Media Studies / Creative Writing with minimum 55% marks, OR BA in English / English Literature / Comparative Literature / Modern Literature / Linguistics / ELT / TESOL / Society and Culture / Media Studies / Creative Writing with minimum 55% marks + relevant teaching experience, OR CELTA / DELTA / PGCTE / PGDTE Certification. Preference: Candidates having prior experience in teaching English will be preferred. Job Requirements: Involved with the Academic Communication Skills course taught to BS-MS first-year students. Attend classes (2 hours) and teach two tutorial batches (3 hours) per week on campus. Grade assignments on a weekly basis.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IISER Pune Teaching Assistant 2026
content_sections.text: Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email. List will also be uploaded on the IISER Pune website.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The appointment is purely temporary and will terminate automatically without any notice. No claim for regular appointment or absorption in IISER Pune. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Age relaxation may be considered for candidates with higher qualifications/experience. Incomplete applications or those received after the deadline will not be considered. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IISER Pune Teaching Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of application is 19 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many Teaching Assistant posts are available at IISER Pune?
faq.answer: There are 05 (Five) part-time Teaching Assistant positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Teaching Assistant (Part-Time) at IISER Pune?
faq.answer: Consolidated emoluments of Rs. 15,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification required for IISER Pune Teaching Assistant?
faq.answer: MA/M.Phil. in English/Linguistics or related fields with 55% marks, or BA + teaching experience, or CELTA/DELTA certification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for IISER Pune Part-Time Teaching Assistant?
faq.answer: Not more than 45 years as on the last date of application.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for IISER Pune Advertisement No. 50/2026?
faq.answer: Send the application in PDF format to [email protected] with the proper subject line.

faq.question: Q7. Is the Teaching Assistant position permanent at IISER Pune?
faq.answer: No, the appointment is purely temporary and contractual.

faq.question: Q8. What subjects will the Teaching Assistant handle at IISER Pune?
faq.answer: Academic Communication Skills course for BS-MS first-year students.

faq.question: Q9. Will experience in teaching English be preferred?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with prior teaching experience in English will be given preference.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the application format for IISER Pune Teaching Assistant Recruitment?
faq.answer: The prescribed format is available on the official IISER Pune website under the advertisement.
